sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move to position 1 and cycle through all states to find pink-bg characters
# Pink-bg hashes: cddd7d2c6a6ceea0, d38ad0a046a963a0, fb80c9b281b063da, f4469c244897540c, 12ee96cc93cd3e0a, b4edb3faf810133b

pink_bg_hashes = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'fb80c9b281b063da', 'f4469c244897540c', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 'b4edb3faf810133b'}

def get_pink_hashes(frame):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    chars = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'B':
            b = n['boundary']
            cr = sum(p[0] for p in b) / len(b)
            cc = sum(p[1] for p in b) / len(b)
            if 50 <= cr <= 58 and 10 <= n['pixels'] <= 50:
                chars.append((cc, n['hash']))
    chars.sort()
    return {cc: h for cc, h in chars}

# Move to pos 1
action(['RIGHT'], intent='solve')
h = get_pink_hashes(current_frame)
print(f"Pos 1 start: {h.get(24.0)}")

# Cycle through all 7 states
pos1_cycle = [h.get(24.0)]
for i in range(7):
    action(['UP'], intent='solve')
    h = get_pink_hashes(current_frame)
    pos1_hash = h.get(24.0)
    pos1_cycle.append(pos1_hash)
    is_pink = pos1_hash in pink_bg_hashes if pos1_hash else False
    print(f"Pos 1 after {i+1} UP: {pos1_hash} {'(PINK-BG)' if is_pink else ''}")

print(f"\nPos 1 full cycle: {pos1_cycle}")
pink_in_pos1 = [h for h in pos1_cycle if h in pink_bg_hashes]
print(f"Pink-bg hashes in pos 1: {pink_in_pos1}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
